const RED = "#7a1010"; const RED_LIGHT = "#f9f0f0"; const RED_MID = "#c04040"; const WA_NUMBER = "601157827088"; const PACKAGE_FEATURES = [ "PROFESSIONAL DSLR, PRINTER & LIGHTING", "1-2 ON-SITE FRIENDLY CREWS", "QR INSTANT DOWNLOADS SOFTCOPY & GIF", "UNLIMITED 2X6 PHOTO PRINTS", "FREE 200 DELUXE PHOTO SLEEVES + UNLIMITED BASIC SLEEVES", "FREE PHOTO LAYOUTS CUSTOMISATION", "FREE BACKDROPS & PROPS STATION", "FREE TRANSPORTATION WITHIN KL & SELANGOR", "FREE INSTAGRAMMABLE MIRROR W/ STAND RENTAL", ]; const LAYOUTS_2R = [ { id: "2rA", name: "Layout A", poses: "4 poses" }, { id: "2rB", name: "Layout B", poses: "3 poses" }, { id: "2rC", name: "Layout C", poses: "3 poses" }, { id: "2rD", name: "Layout D", poses: "3 poses" }, { id: "2rE", name: "Layout E", poses: "Customization" }, ]; const LAYOUTS_4R = [ { id: "4rA", name: "Layout A", poses: "1 pose" }, { id: "4rB", name: "Layout B", poses: "4 poses" }, { id: "4rC", name: "Layout C", poses: "2 poses" }, { id: "4rD", name: "Layout D", poses: "2 poses" }, { id: "4rE", name: "Layout E", poses: "4 poses" }, { id: "4rF", name: "Layout F", poses: "3 poses" }, { id: "4rG", name: "Layout G", poses: "Customization" }, ]; const TENSION_BACKDROPS = [ { id: "marble_white", name: "Marble White", color: "#f0f0f0", pattern: "marble" }, { id: "blush_marble", name: "Blush Marble Pink", color: "#f9e4e4", pattern: "marble-pink" }, { id: "light_grey", name: "Light Grey", color: "#d0d0d0" }, { id: "cream_beige", name: "Cream Beige", color: "#f5e8c8" }, { id: "lavender", name: "Lavender", color: "#c8b8e8" }, { id: "periwinkle", name: "Periwinkle Blue", color: "#b0c0e8" }, { id: "mint_green", name: "Mint Green", color: "#b8e8d0" }, { id: "galaxy_purple", name: "Galaxy Purple", color: "#3a0060", galaxy: true }, ]; const CURTAIN_BACKDROPS = [ { id: "wine_red", name: "Wine Red", color: "#8b1a1a" }, { id: "royal_blue", name: "Royal Blue", color: "#1a3a8b" }, { id: "cream_white", name: "Cream White", color: "#f8f4e8", border: true }, { id: "choco_brown", name: "Chocolate Brown", color: "#5c3a1a" }, { id: "dusty_blue", name: "Dusty Blue", color: "#7090a8" }, { id: "blush_sequin", name: "Blush Pink Sequin", color: "#f0b8c8", sequin: true }, { id: "mint_sequin", name: "Mint Green Sequin", color: "#88c8a8", sequin: true }, { id: "blush_tulle", name: "Blush Pink Tulle", color: "#f8d0dc", tulle: true }, { id: "tiffany_tulle", name: "Tiffany Blue Tulle", color: "#8fd8d8", tulle: true }, ]; const ALL_BACKDROPS = [ ...TENSION_BACKDROPS, ...CURTAIN_BACKDROPS, { id: "custom", name: "Customization" }, { id: "own", name: "Own Backdrop" }, ]; const SLEEVES = [ { id: "red", name: "Red Sleeve", color: "#8b1a1a" }, { id: "white", name: "White Sleeve", color: "#f5f5f5", border: true }, { id: "black", name: "Black Sleeve", color: "#1a1a1a" }, ]; const BOOKING_PROCESS = [ { step: 1, icon: "📋", title: "Package Confirmation", desc: "Choose your preferred package and add-ons to get started." }, { step: 2, icon: "💳", title: "Deposit / PO / LO", desc: "A deposit invoice or acceptance form will be issued to secure your booking." }, { step: 3, icon: "📅", title: "Booking Confirmed", desc: "Once deposit is received, a Google Calendar invite will be sent to you." }, { step: 4, icon: "🎨", title: "Design Details", desc: "Submit your design preferences at least 2–4 weeks before your event date." }, { step: 5, icon: "✏️", title: "Design Draft & Confirm", desc: "Our design team will prepare a draft for your review and approval." }, { step: 6, icon: "💰", title: "Final Payment", desc: "Full payment is required after design is confirmed and before event day." }, { step: 7, icon: "🎉", title: "Event Day", desc: "Sit back and enjoy your LOVéA Photobooth experience!" }, ]; const STEPS = [ { label: "Package", sub: "Package details" }, { label: "Add-ons", sub: "Optional extras" }, { label: "Layout", sub: "Photo layout" }, { label: "Backdrop", sub: "Pick a backdrop" }, { label: "Sleeve", sub: "Photo sleeve" }, { label: "Process", sub: "Booking journey" }, { label: "Setup", sub: "Requirements" }, { label: "T&C", sub: "Terms & Conditions" }, ]; const SETUP_TEXT = `• Client must provide a setup area with a minimum space of 10ft x 10ft, minimal natural light, a power point within 10 metres, a clean and dry flat floor, and adequate ventilation. A photo of the setup location must be submitted to LOVEA in advance. • LOVEA reserves the right to modify or reject the setup if the requirements are not met. Any lighting, exposure, or image quality issues caused by unsuitable setup conditions will not be accepted as complaints. • Outdoor or semi-outdoor setups must be fully sheltered from rain and unsafe conditions. Operations will stop immediately if safety is compromised. No refunds, extensions, or compensation will be provided for weather-related or unsuitable venue disruptions. • LOVEA crew has full discretion over session flow, queue management, retakes, and printing operations to maintain service quality. Clients must communicate any specific event schedule or requirements in advance or on-site. LOVEA is not liable for issues arising from insufficient briefing.`; const TERMS_TEXT = `1. Booking & Payment • RM200 deposit is required to secure the booking date. • Deposit payment confirms acceptance of the quotation and these Terms & Conditions. • Quotations are valid for 7 days and subject to date availability. • Full balance must be paid at least 7 days before the event. • Bookings made within 5 working days of the event are subject to a 15% surcharge and require full payment. • Corporate or government bookings require an approved PO, LOU, or Confirmation Letter. • Deposits are non-refundable. 2. Photos, Videos & Backdrops • Digital files will be shared via an online gallery available for 30 days. Clients are responsible for downloading and backing up their files. • LOVEA may use event content for marketing purposes unless otherwise requested. • One standard backdrop is included per booking, subject to availability. • Custom backdrop orders require full payment and are non-refundable once approved. • Any damage caused to LOVEA backdrops, equipment, or materials by clients or guests will be chargeable. 3. Additional Charges • Items or services not included in the package will be charged separately. • Transportation is complimentary within 50km of LOVEA's base location. Additional distance is charged at RM3/km. • Early setup requests and last-minute add-ons may incur additional charges. 4. Branding & Design • LOVEA branding may not be removed unless a removal fee applies. • Up to 3 design drafts and 2 revisions are included. • Additional revisions or design requests are chargeable. • Design discussions are available during business hours only. 5. Person In Charge (PIC) • Clients must appoint a reachable Person In Charge (PIC) during setup and event operations. • Changes requested within 24 hours of the event may not be accommodated. • Failure to respond to final confirmation may be treated as a cancellation. 6. Force Majeure • LOVEA is not liable for delays or service interruptions caused by circumstances beyond reasonable control, including weather, power failures, internet disruptions, government restrictions, venue limitations, or other unforeseen events. • No refunds will be provided under such circumstances. 7. Refunds, Damage & Complaints • Refunds are only available if cancellation is initiated by LOVEA. • Client cancellations are non-refundable but may be rescheduled within 1 year, subject to availability. • Any service issues must be reported during the event for review. • Clients are responsible for any loss or damage caused by themselves, guests, venue staff, or third parties. • LOVEA reserves the right to assess and charge for any repair or replacement costs arising from such damage.`; // ── Helpers ── function Checkbox({ checked, small }) { const sz = small ? 18 : 22; return (
{checked ? "✓" : ""}
); } function AgreeLine({ checked, onToggle, label }) { return ( ); } function Remark({ lines }) { return (
{lines.map((l, i) => (
•{l}
))}
); } function BackdropSwatch({ item, selected, onSelect }) { return (
onSelect(item.id)} style={{ cursor: "pointer", borderRadius: 10, overflow: "hidden", border: selected ? `2.5px solid ${RED}` : "2.5px solid transparent", boxShadow: selected ? `0 3px 12px rgba(122,16,16,0.2)` : "0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)", transition: "all 0.18s", background: "#fff" }}>
{item.galaxy &&
} {item.sequin &&
} {item.tulle &&
} {item.pattern === "marble" &&
} {item.pattern === "marble-pink" &&
} {item.id === "custom" && ✏️} {item.id === "own" && 🎨} {selected &&
✓
}
{item.name}
); } function StepBar({ step }) { return (
{STEPS.map((s, i) => (
{i < step ? "✓" : i+1}
{s.label}
{i < STEPS.length - 1 &&
}
))}
); } // ── Main App ── export default function App() { const [step, setStep] = useState(0); const [addons, setAddons] = useState([]); const [gbType, setGbType] = useState("standard"); const [gbMatte, setGbMatte] = useState(false); const [kcQty, setKcQty] = useState("100"); const [kcPrice, setKcPrice] = useState("RM300"); const [layout, setLayout] = useState(null); const [designPref, setDesignPref] = useState(""); const [backdrop, setBackdrop] = useState(null); const [sleeve, setSleeve] = useState(null); const [extraSleeveQty, setExtraSleeveQty] = useState(""); const [agreedProcess, setAgreedProcess] = useState(false); const [agreedSetup, setAgreedSetup] = useState(false); const [agreedTerms, setAgreedTerms] = useState(false); const has4R = addons.includes("upgrade4r"); const layouts = has4R ? LAYOUTS_4R : LAYOUTS_2R; const extraTimePrice = has4R ? "RM200" : "RM150"; const toggleAddon = (id) => { setAddons(a => a.includes(id) ? a.filter(x => x !== id) : [...a, id]); if (id === "upgrade4r") setLayout(null); }; const canNext = () => { if (step === 0) return true; if (step === 1) return true; if (step === 2) return !!layout; if (step === 3) return !!backdrop; if (step === 4) return !!sleeve; if (step === 5) return agreedProcess; if (step === 6) return agreedSetup; if (step === 7) return agreedTerms; return true; }; const isLast = step === STEPS.length - 1; const sendWhatsApp = () => { const addonLines = []; if (has4R) addonLines.push(" - Upgrade to 4R Photo: RM300"); if (addons.includes("extratime")) addonLines.push(` - Extra Time: ${extraTimePrice}`); if (addons.includes("guestbook")) { let g = ` - Photo Guestbook: ${gbType === "standard" ? "Standard RM70" : "Customization RM100"}`; if (gbMatte) g += " + Matte Cover RM15"; addonLines.push(g); } if (addons.includes("keychain")) addonLines.push(` - Photo Keychain: ${kcQty} pcs (${kcPrice})`); const layoutObj = layouts.find(l => l.id === layout); const backdropName = ALL_BACKDROPS.find(b => b.id === backdrop)?.name || "-"; const sleeveName = SLEEVES.find(s => s.id === sleeve)?.name || "-"; const msg = `📸 *LOVéA Photobooth Booking Form*\n\n` + `*Package:* Standard Package\n\n` + `*Add-ons:*\n${addonLines.length ? addonLines.join("\n") : " None"}\n\n` + `*Layout:* ${layoutObj ? layoutObj.name + " · " + layoutObj.poses : "-"}\n` + `*Design Preference:* ${designPref || "Not specified"}\n\n` + `*Backdrop:* ${backdropName}\n` + `*Sleeve:* ${sleeveName}${extraSleeveQty ? ` + ${extraSleeveQty} pcs add-on` : ""}\n\n` + `✅ Understood booking process, setup requirements & T&C\n\n` + `Hello! I would like to submit my booking form.`; window.open(`https://wa.me/${WA_NUMBER}?text=${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`, "_blank"); }; const handleNext = () => { if (!canNext()) return; if (isLast) sendWhatsApp(); else setStep(s => s + 1); }; const handleReset = () => { setStep(0); setAddons([]); setLayout(null); setDesignPref(""); setBackdrop(null); setSleeve(null); setExtraSleeveQty(""); setGbType("standard"); setGbMatte(false); setKcQty("100"); setKcPrice("RM300"); setAgreedProcess(false); setAgreedSetup(false); setAgreedTerms(false); }; return (
{/* Header */}
Instant Event Photobooth
{/* Progress bar */}
{/* Content */}
{/* Step heading */}
{STEPS[step].label}
{STEPS[step].sub}
{/* ── STEP 0: Package ── */} {step === 0 && (
Standard Package
Auto-selected · All inclusive
✓
{PACKAGE_FEATURES.map((f,i) => (
★ {f}
))}
)} {/* ── STEP 1: Add-ons ── */} {step === 1 && (
All add-ons are optional
{/* a. Upgrade 4R */}
toggleAddon("upgrade4r")} style={{ padding:"14px 16px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",cursor:"pointer" }}>
Upgrade to 4R Photo
